location: Guaranteed drop from the mini-boss Black Knight Garrew at Fog Rift Fort. Reached by carefully cliff-dropping northwest from the Scadu Altus, West site of grace down onto the fort's towers.
tactics: This weapon is not obtainable in the base game at all — Fog Rift Fort, Scadu Altus, and Black Knight Garrew are all Shadow of the Erdtree DLC content.
From the Scadu Altus, West grace, step to the cliff edge and drop down the mountainside in stages until you land safely atop one of the fort's towers.
Black Knight Garrew is a heavily armored greatsword-and-shield mini-boss at the end of the bridge; his overhead swings are slow and telegraphed, so bait and punish rather than trading.
It's easy to confuse this with the similarly-named Black Steel items found at the Church of Consolation elsewhere in Gravesite Plain — those are different drops.
lore: Standard-issue armor of the Black Knights who serve Messmer the Impaler — black steel trimmed with gold, carried by soldiers bred to never yield and never question their purpose.

builds.name: Holy-resistant Strength tank
builds.why: Very high base Holy guard (84%, reaching 100% with a Sacred affinity at +10) makes this a strong pick against Messmer's fire/holy-heavy DLC bosses.
